dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9223 IH: To amend the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act to authorize the Secretary of Education to extend paperwork reduction waivers, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Letlow introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act to authorize the Secretary of Education to extend paperwork reduction waivers, and for other purposes.

section.text: Section 609(a)(2) of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (20 U.S.C. 1408(a)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A), by inserting (which may be extended by the Secretary in accordance with subparagraph (C)) after 4 years ;
by redesignating subparagraph (C) as subparagraph (D); and
by inserting after subparagraph (B) the following:

subclause.text: in accordance with clause (ii), grant an extension of the period of a waiver granted to a State under subparagraph (A); and
grant more than 1 such extension to a State.

clause.text: Each extension granted pursuant to clause (i) may not exceed a period of 4 years.
